scripts.lint: bun run --filter backend lint && bun run --filter frontend lint
scripts.test: bun run --filter backend test && bun run --filter frontend test
scripts.ci:check: bun run lint && bun run --filter backend cspell && bun run --filter frontend cspell && bun run build && bun run test
scripts.ci:full: bun run ci:check && bun run --filter backend ci:solidity && bun run --filter backend slither
